# Qa And Acceptance Review Template

Copy this template into the relevant project note or working draft. Replace placeholders with repository-backed facts or user-provided context. Leave unknown values blank or mark them as `Unknown`; do not invent them.

```markdown
# QA and Acceptance Review — <Work Item / Release>

## Scope under review

## Acceptance criteria coverage

| Criterion | Evidence | Status | Gap / risk | Next action |
|---|---|---|---|---|
|  |  | Met / Partial / Not met / Unknown |  |  |

## Defects / concerns

## Signoff readiness

Ready / At risk / Blocked / Unknown

## Recommended next actions

## Missing evidence
```
